Apologies team!

This slipped from our plate. I know the date for response has lapsed, but Rachel I’d love to get a call planned next week for the team so we can understand tentative timelines, and expected office actions as we continue through the patent process.

We’d love to support your team through this process and provide the technical basis for questions, interrogatories, and more that you or team may receive from the patent office as we continue. Thank you for your continued support!...

summaries.full_body_preview:
Dear George and team,

Further to Rachel's email below, today we filed an Information Disclosure Statement (IDS) in the corresponding U.S. patent application, serial no. 19/402,948, to disclose the International Search Report and cited references. A copy of the IDS is attached for your records.

We will notify you of new developments as they occur, but in the meantime, please don't hesitate to contact us if you have questions.

Kind regards,

Dacia

summaries.subject: Following up on your exchange with Mayor-President Monique Boulet and George Marks
key_points:
Dear Lyle,

I am writing to you on behalf of George Marks and the Lafayette International Center (LIC), following your recent exchange with him and Mayor-President Monique Boulet
George asked me to follow up with you to arrange a time for us to meet
As the LIC focuses on supporting Lafayette-based businesses with international trade and commerce, we would be delighted to visit your facility and learn more about DMR Technologies' operations
summaries.full_body_preview:

George asked me to follow up with you to arrange a time for us to meet. As the LIC focuses on supporting Lafayette-based businesses with international trade and commerce, we would be delighted to visit your facility and learn more about DMR Technologies' operations.

I am excited about the possibility of you all taking over Trappey from the current/prospective buyers
summaries.full_body_preview:
Hi RJ and Lyle!

It was so great seeing you guys last week when I arranged for a tour with DMR for the mayor.

I am excited about the possibility of you all taking over Trappey from the current/prospective buyers. I haven’t heard a thing (since November ‘25) from the group out of North Carolina that was going to buy the land from Stephen and Marcel. It was a gentleman named Raghunadha Kotha. Ravi was somehow engaged. I’m unsure where that stands.

I’m following up with you to reiterate tha...

summaries.subject: [Product Update] Google Meet default download settings change
key_points:
Google Workspace logo



New Google Meet video recordings will allow downloading and copying by  
default

Dear administrator,

Currently, Google Meet video recordings do not allow viewers to download or  
copy them by default unless the recording owner explicitly allows it
Starting April 30, 2026, we will change this default for future recordings
summaries.full_body_preview:
Google Workspace logo



New Google Meet video recordings will allow downloading and copying by  
default.



Dear administrator,

Currently, Google Meet video recordings do not allow viewers to download or  
copy them by default unless the recording owner explicitly allows it.  
Starting April 30, 2026, we will change this default for future recordings.  
Moving forward, recording owners will need to manually restrict this  
setting for individual recordings if they do not want v...

I set up the model to generate a NDTDS prospect list every 7 to 10 days and to open a database for storage
I'd like to lean into this a bit more and assist where I can for a while
Not sure where we are in setting up structure to the NDT sales efforts, but we seem to have amazing tech supporting us now in every way imaginable
